# Modules

> Module boundaries — what each part owns and (importantly) does NOT own.
> The "does NOT own" line is the most valuable for AI agents.

### `src/`

**Role:** source code

**Owns:** _(what does this module own?)_

**Does NOT own:** _(what should NEVER live here?)_

**Depends on:** _(internal/external dependencies)_

---

### `scripts/`

**Role:** build/dev scripts

**Owns:** _(what does this module own?)_

**Does NOT own:** _(what should NEVER live here?)_

**Depends on:** _(internal/external dependencies)_

---

### `.github/`

**Role:** GitHub workflows/config

**Owns:** _(what does this module own?)_

**Does NOT own:** _(what should NEVER live here?)_

**Depends on:** _(internal/external dependencies)_

---

### `docs/`

**Role:** documentation

**Owns:** _(what does this module own?)_

**Does NOT own:** _(what should NEVER live here?)_

**Depends on:** _(internal/external dependencies)_
